name: The Funni Farm CBG Gummies
shortDescription: Mixed fruit, non-intoxicating CBG-rich gummies with label-backed serving details for adult wellness routines.
fullDescription: A small-batch mixed fruit gummy listing built from the supplied Funni Farm label. The label states 2-3 mg CBG per gummy, 100-150 mg total CBG per 50-gummy bag, and adult-use directions. Final live sales still need the current batch number, matching COA link, and legal review.
ingredients: Water, corn syrup, MCT oil (hemp-derived CBG extract), gelatin, natural and artificial flavors, citric acid, guar gum, malic acid, potassium sorbate (preservative), sodium benzoate (preservative). Contains coconut from MCT oil. This product may contain allergens.
cannabinoidInfo: The supplied label states 2-3 mg CBG per gummy and 100-150 mg total CBG per 50-gummy bag. Link the current batch COA before live sales.
batchNumber: Batch number pending on final package
hempComplianceNote: Label includes hemp-derived adult-use compliance language, 21+ only positioning, family-owned/farm-to-plate/lab-tested badges, blank lot/batch/MFG/best-by fields, and a scan area for COA, cannabinoid profile, and third-party lab results. Confirm the current batch COA before live sales.
shippingRestrictions: Ships only where hemp-derived edible products are permitted. Final restricted-state list required before live sales.
